name: Ryan Baumann

intro: I lead Developer Experience engineering and product teams. We turn recurring developer friction into tools, evals, and reference apps that help humans and agents reach working code.
description: Ryan Baumann leads Developer Experience Engineering and product for builder platforms, focusing on tools, evals, and AI coding agents.
aboutTeaser: I lead Developer Experience Engineering and product. I stay close to the code by reviewing traces, writing evals, and shipping apps.

sectionIntros.work: Shipped tools, open-source libraries, and experiments — the problem and result behind each.
sectionIntros.writing: Notes on builder platforms, AI coding agents, evals, and open source.
sectionIntros.talks: Demo-first talks on developer tools, AI-assisted development, and reliable generated code.
sectionIntros.demos: Ryan’s Lab is where I learn in public through working reference apps and experiments.

positioning: Developer Experience Engineering, product, and AI coding agents.

answerEngineSummary: Ryan Baumann is a Developer Experience Engineering and product lead who builds tools, evals, and workflows for humans and AI coding agents. His current work at Google Maps Platform includes Code Assist, agent skills, and an agentic eval suite.
